ddls:
CREATE TABLE "rides" (
  "ride_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ride */,
  "rideable_type" TEXT /* Type of bike used for the ride */,
  "start_station_name" TEXT /* Name of the starting station */,
  "start_station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the starting station */,
  "end_station_name" TEXT /* Name of the ending station */,
  "end_station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the ending station */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the ride started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the ride ended */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the ride in minutes */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who took the ride */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the route taken */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the ride */,
  "traffic_conditions" TEXT /* Traffic conditions during the ride */,
  "user_feedback" TEXT /* User feedback about the ride */,
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the promotion used */,
  "gps_data" TEXT /* GPS data for the entire ride */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ride_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rides_start_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("start_station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rides_end_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("end_station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rides_promotion_id FOREIGN KEY ("promotion_id") REFERENCES promotions ("promotion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rides_rideable_type FOREIGN KEY ("rideable_type") REFERENCES rideable_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rides_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location description of the station */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Number of bike docks at the station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the station */,
  "total_docks" INTEGER /* Total number of docks at the station */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the station */,
  "last_maintenance" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last maintenance */,
  "security_camera" INTEGER /* Indicates if the station has a security camera */,
  "accessibility" INTEGER /* Indicates if the station is accessible to people with disabilities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rideable_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bike type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the bike type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the bike type */,
  "battery_capacity" INTEGER /* Battery capacity for electric bikes */,
  "maintenance_frequency" INTEGER /* Recommended maintenance frequency */,
  "max_speed" INTEGER /* Maximum speed of the bike type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered */,
  "membership_type" TEXT /* Type of membership (e.g., monthly, annual) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact information */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ride_issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue */,
  "ride_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ride where the issue occurred */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the issue */,
  "reported_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reported the issue */,
  "report_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the issue was reported */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the issue */,
  "resolution_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the issue was resolved */,
  "resolution_description" TEXT /* Description of how the issue was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ride_issues_ride_id FOREIGN KEY ("ride_id") REFERENCES rides ("ride_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ride_issues_reported_by FOREIGN KEY ("reported_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the payment */,
  "ride_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ride for which the payment was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount charged for the ride */,
  "payment_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the payment was made */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Transaction ID from the payment processor */,
  "refund_amount" REAL /* Amount refunded, if any */,
  "refund_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the refund, if any */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_ride_id FOREIGN KEY ("ride_id") REFERENCES rides ("ride_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "station_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status update */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station */,
  "available_bikes" INTEGER /* Number of available bikes at the station */,
  "available_docks" INTEGER /* Number of available docks at the station */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the status was last updated */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions at the station */,
  "traffic_conditions" TEXT /* Traffic conditions around the station */,
  "maintenance_status" TEXT /* Maintenance status of the station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_station_status_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance activity */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station where maintenance occurred */,
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bike that was maintained */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance activity */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the maintenance started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the maintenance ended */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance */,
  "completed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the staff member who completed the maintenance */,
  "parts_used" TEXT /* Details of parts used during maintenance */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_completed_by FOREIGN KEY ("completed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotions" (
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the promotion */,
  "discount_percentage" INTEGER /* Percentage discount offered */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the promotion */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the promotion */,
  "target_group" TEXT /* Target group for the promotion */,
  "promotion_code" TEXT /* Code that users need to enter to avail the promotion */,
  "usage_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the promotion has been used */,
  "max_usage" INTEGER /* Maximum number of times the promotion can be used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "usage_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "generation_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the report was generated */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data used in the report */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report's findings */,
  "recommendations" TEXT /* Recommendations provided in the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usage_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
